reason: Root-KGD provider and assets must live under approved backend/package paths.
TEP producer and Evidence adapter changes must keep reasoning outputs out of adapter records.
RCA result shape and ranked_root_causes/top_k_paths contracts are backend-wide runtime payloads.
RcaReasoner integration and KGTracePipeline provider boundary are defined here.
Runtime asset loading and ambiguous/missing RCA inputs should fail or degrade explicitly.
Focused tests and lint commands are required before finishing.
